channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Uganda Evacuates Citizens Amid Anti-Migrant Violence in South Africa
item.description: At least three Ugandans have been killed in South Africa amid ongoing anti-migrant violence, according to acting Foreign Affairs Minister Haruna Kasolo. The deaths occurred in KwaZulu-Natal and Cape T...

item.title: Jewish organizations urge Canadian Museum for Human Rights board to address issues with Nakba exhibit and ensure accountability
item.description: Prominent Canadian Jewish organizations, including B’nai Brith Canada and the Centre for Israel and Jewish Affairs, have issued a joint letter to the board of the Canadian Museum for Human Rights (CMH...

item.title: Challenges Faced by Kenyan Mothers Caring for Disabled Children
item.description: A Kenyan mother caring for children with disabilities has shared her daily struggles, highlighting the systemic challenges faced by families raising children with special needs. The article details fi...

item.title: Egypt advances to World Cup last 16 after penalty shootout victory over Australia
item.description: Egypt secured a historic World Cup knockout victory over Australia in a penalty shootout, advancing to the last 16. The match, held in Texas, ended 1-1 after extra time, forcing a decisive shootout. E...

item.title: Quebec and Ottawa Reach Caribou Conservation Agreement Amid Environmental Concerns
item.description: Environmentalists in Quebec and Ottawa have expressed mixed reactions to a new funding deal aimed at conserving the province’s dwindling caribou herds. The agreement, announced by the federal governme...

item.title: National Assembly Speaker Supports Ruto's 2027 Re-election and Calls for Peaceful Politics
item.description: National Assembly speaker Moses Wetang'ula has intensified campaigns for President William Ruto's 2027 re-election, emphasizing the region's continued support for ongoing development projects and econ...

item.title: World Cup Match Between England and Mexico Rescheduled to Avoid Storms
item.description: The World Cup quarter-final clash between England and Mexico has been rescheduled from 8:00 p.m. to 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time on Sunday to mitigate the risk of severe storms in Mexico City. Mexican media...

item.title: ‘Silo’ Confirms Final Season, Wraps Up Dystopian Saga
item.description: The Apple TV+ sci-fi series ‘Silo,’ created by Graham Yost and based on Hugh Howey’s novels, has been renewed for a fourth and final season. The series, set in a dystopian underground silo, follows en...

item.title: Maharashtra restricts sale of energy drinks within 500-metre radius of schools to protect student health
item.description: The state of Maharashtra has introduced a restriction on the sale of energy drinks in areas located within a 500-metre radius of schools. The move is aimed at limiting easy access to high-caffeine and...

item.title: Egypt Advances to World Cup Last 16 After Penalty Shootout Victory Over Australia
item.description: Egypt made history by defeating Australia 4-2 in a penalty shootout to reach the World Cup last 16 for the first time ever. The match, held at Dallas Stadium in Arlington on July 3, 2026, ended 1-1 af...

item.title: Iran holds week-long funeral events for slain Supreme Leader Khamenei amid political and economic turmoil
item.description: Iran's late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's body was displayed in a Tehran hall for a week of mourning events, marking the end of his 37-year rule. The funeral processions, which include visit...

item.title: Tadej Pogacar aims for fifth Tour de France title amid fierce competition
item.description: Slovenian cyclist Tadej Pogacar, who has already won the Tour de France twice, is set to compete in the 2026 edition starting in Barcelona. The 27-year-old aims to join an elite group of cyclists with...

item.title: ASIC warns of oversight gaps and rising risks in superannuation investment platforms and adviser fee structures
item.description: The article examines concerns raised by the Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) about governance weaknesses in superannuation investment platforms that manage hundreds of billions ...

item.title: Road crash on Nakuru-Eldoret Highway leaves six dead, five injured
item.description: A road crash involving a matatu and a trailer on the Nakuru-Eldoret Highway resulted in six fatalities and five injuries. According to Kuresoi North Sub-County Police Commander John Kimutai, the incid...

item.title: Two Mothers Face Allegations of Child Abuse in Chatsworth and Phoenix
item.description: Two single mothers from Phoenix and Chatsworth are alleged to have engaged in sexual activities with their minor children, according to reports shared with South African authorities. Prem Balram of Re...

item.title: B.C. Lions Face Unbeaten Edmonton Elks in Crucial CFL Match
item.description: The B.C. Lions, starting the CFL season 0-3, aim to end their losing streak against the undefeated Edmonton Elks. Coach Buck Pierce highlighted the team's need to reduce self-inflicted mistakes, citin...

item.title: Melania Trump Pushes Foster Care Legislation Through Congress Independently
item.description: First Lady Melania Trump has reportedly set a private deadline for Congress to pass her signature foster care bill, bypassing traditional White House channels. According to a Politico report, she publ...

item.title: Second convoy of 3,865 Amarnath pilgrims departs from Jammu under tight security arrangements
item.description: The second batch of pilgrims for the Amarnath Yatra 2026 departed from the Yatri Niwas base camp in Jammu early Friday morning, marking a continued phase of the annual pilgrimage to the holy cave shri...

item.title: Ombudsman files plunder case against Marcoleta over P75M campaign funds
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman has filed a plunder case against Senator Rodante Marcoleta, alleging he received P75 million in undeclared campaign contributions. The case was filed after the senator's ra...

item.title: Major Transfers in PSL as Mofokeng Joins European League
item.description: The Premier Soccer League (PSL) transfer window has seen significant activity, with Relebohile Mofokeng's move to European club Royale Union Saint-Gilloise as the standout deal. The 32-year-old attack...
